'''bavapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whapuka|whapuka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whapuka|whapuka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bavapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bævæpæth|bævæpæth]] || [[word:bævæpæj|bævæpæj]] || [[word:bævæpæsh|bævæpæsh]] || [[word:bævæpæ|bævæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bavavapath|bavavapath]] || [[word:bavavapaj|bavavapaj]] || [[word:bavavapash|bavavapash]] || [[word:bavavapa|bavavapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bavapath|bavapath]] || [[word:bavapaj|bavapaj]] || [[word:bavapash|bavapash]] || [[word:bavapa|bavapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bavafpath|bavafpath]] || [[word:bavafpaj|bavafpaj]] || [[word:bavafpash|bavafpash]] || [[word:bavafpaf|bavafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bavapatha|bavapatha]] || [[word:bavapaja|bavapaja]] || [[word:bavapasha|bavapasha]] || [[word:bavapaka|bavapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bavapath|bavapath]] || [[word:bavapaj|bavapaj]] || [[word:bavapash|bavapash]] || [[word:bavapa|bavapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bavapathal|bavapathal]] || [[word:bavapajal|bavapajal]] || [[word:bavapashal|bavapashal]] || [[word:bavapakal|bavapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bavapathatha|bavapathatha]] || [[word:bavapajaja|bavapajaja]] || [[word:bavapashasha|bavapashasha]] || [[word:bavapaka|bavapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bavapathan|bavapathan]] || [[word:bavapajan|bavapajan]] || [[word:bavapashan|bavapashan]] || [[word:bavapakan|bavapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bavapathaoro|bavapathaoro]] || [[word:bavapajaoro|bavapajaoro]] || [[word:bavapashaoro|bavapashaoro]] || [[word:bavapakaoro|bavapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
